metadata.description: How to create AI videos with Seedance 2.0? 1. Upload text, images, video, or audio 2. Generate 1080p video 3. Download free. Create Hollywood-quality 15-second videos with multimodal AI. No registration required. Text-to-video, image-to-video online.

modelIntro.title: Why Seedance 2.0 Stands Out for AI Video Creation
description: ByteDance's Seedance 2.0 brings a single-pipeline approach to AI video: mix text prompts with up to 9 images, 3 video clips, and 3 audio clips in one request. No need to chain separate tools—describe your scene, add references, and get cinema-grade output.

The model handles complex motion and physics-aware rendering, with fine control over lighting, camera, and performance. Output is 15-second 1080p multi-shot videos with stereo audio, ready for social, ads, or pre-production.
Toolaze offers free access online. No sign-up required—start creating from your browser.

featureCards.title: 1080p Cinema-Grade Output Without the Wait
featureCards.content: Seedance 2.0 delivers broadcast-ready 1080p in seconds. Multi-shot sequences with accurate lighting and motion keep quality high while staying efficient. Skip the 4K overhead when full HD is enough for your workflow.

featureCards.title: One Pipeline for Text, Images, Video, and Audio
featureCards.content: Feed the model any mix of inputs: written prompts, style references, sample clips, or sound. It infers motion, effects, and tone from your materials, so you spend less time iterating and more time shipping.

featureCards.title: Video and Audio in a Single Generation
featureCards.content: The joint audio-video architecture outputs picture and sound together. Speech, ambience, and effects stay in sync without extra post-work. One click, one result—complete clips for social, ads, or storyboards.

hero.desc: Create Hollywood-quality 1080p videos with Seedance 2.0 for free. Upload text, images, video, and audio online. Multimodal AI video generation—coming soon.

intro.title: Why Choose Seedance 2.0 AI Video Generator?

content.title: The Most Comprehensive Multimodal Video AI in the Industry
content.text: Seedance 2.0 is ByteDance's next-generation AI video generation model that adopts a unified multimodal audio-video joint generation architecture. Unlike single-mode tools that only accept text prompts, Seedance 2.0 supports text, image, audio, and video inputs simultaneously—leading to the most comprehensive multimodal content reference and editing capabilities available today. You can combine up to 9 reference images, 3 video clips, and 3 audio clips with natural language instructions for unprecedented creative control over your AI-generated videos.

content.title: Hollywood-Quality Output with Director-Level Control
content.text: Generate 15-second high-quality multi-shot videos with dual-channel audio in a single pass. Seedance 2.0 excels at rendering complex motions and interactions while following physical laws—even handling challenging scenarios like pair figure skating or dynamic camera movements. You get director-level control over performance, lighting, shadow, and camera movement, making it ideal for professional film production, advertising campaigns, e-commerce product videos, and game cinematics. The model is designed to significantly lower content creation costs while maintaining broadcast-quality output.

content.title: Free Online Access with No Registration Required
content.text: Toolaze provides free access to Seedance 2.0 AI video generation online. No sign-up, no credit card, and no hidden fees. Whether you're a content creator prototyping ideas, a marketer testing ad concepts, or a filmmaker exploring storyboards, you can start creating 1080p videos immediately. The free AI video generator supports text-to-video, image-to-video, and full multimodal generation—all from your browser with no software installation required.

faq.a: Seedance 2.0 is ByteDance's next-generation AI video generation model launched in February 2026. It uses a unified multimodal architecture supporting text, image, video, and audio inputs to create 15-second high-quality videos with dual-channel audio. The model excels at complex motions, follows physical laws, and offers director-level control over performance, lighting, shadow, and camera movement. It's designed for professional film, advertising, e-commerce, and gaming production.

Yes! Toolaze offers free access to Seedance 2.0 AI video generation online. No sign-up or registration required to get started. You can create videos with text, images, video, and audio inputs at no cost. There are no hidden fees, subscriptions, or credit card requirements. Start generating Hollywood-quality 1080p videos immediately.

Seedance 2.0 supports four input types: text (natural language descriptions), images (up to 9 reference images), video clips (up to 3), and audio clips (up to 3). You can combine any of these with natural language instructions for maximum creative flexibility. This multimodal approach gives you unprecedented control—add visual references for style, sample footage for consistency, or sync with audio in a single generation.

faq.q: How does Seedance 2.0 compare to Sora 2?
faq.a: Sora 2 (OpenAI) excels at physics accuracy and realism, with strong audio sync and a "characters" feature to insert real people into scenes. Available via Sora app and sora.com. Seedance 2.0 (ByteDance) stands out with multimodal input—text plus up to 9 images, 3 video clips, and 3 audio clips in one pass. 1080p output with director-level control. Toolaze offers free online access. Core difference: Sora 2 for realism and OpenAI ecosystem; Seedance 2.0 for multimodal flexibility and free web use.

faq.q: Can Seedance 2.0 generate audio with video?
faq.a: Yes. Seedance 2.0 uses a unified audio-video joint generation architecture. It can generate 15-second videos with dual-channel audio simultaneously, making it ideal for content that needs synchronized sound. This eliminates the need for separate audio generation or manual syncing—you get complete video with audio in one pass.

faq.q: How long can Seedance 2.0 videos be?
faq.a: Seedance 2.0 generates 15-second high-quality multi-shot videos per generation. This length is ideal for social media (TikTok, Reels, Shorts), advertisements, concept previews, and storyboards. For longer content, you can create multiple 15-second clips and combine them in video editing software. The model focuses on quality within this optimal duration.

faq.q: Do I need to install software to use Seedance 2.0?
faq.a: No. Toolaze runs Seedance 2.0 entirely in your web browser. No software installation, no downloads, and no plugins required. Simply visit the website, upload your text prompts and reference materials, and generate videos directly online. Works on Windows, Mac, and most modern browsers.
